nodes.itemHTML: • Redpandastars5k - A streaming platform for mission critical workloads. Kafka® compatible, No Zookeeper®, no JVM, and no code changes required.
• Loadmill - Generate tests from user behavior.
• A collection of notes that summarize EmberConf 2021
• Floating-Point Numbers and Formal Proofstars5 - Introductory course on Coq real numbers and floating-point numbers from the Flocq library.
• L7stars2.9k - Large-scale WebGL-powered Geospatial Data Visualization analysis framework, maintained by Alibaba
• L7 Plotstars41 - Geospatial Visualization Chart Library, maintained by Alibaba
• Dipperstars23 - Map application development framework powered by L7, maintained by Alibaba.
• Graphinstars780 - Graph visualization library powered by React & Typescript (built on top of G6, maintained by Alibaba.
• Michael Frank - Stanford, The Stanford Language and Cognition Lab - Department of Psychology, Stanford.
• 🧬 Container Queriesstars70 - Adds CSS Container Query variants.
• Loki - horizontally-scalable, highly-available, multi-tenant log aggregation system inspired by Prometheus.
• golem-bulk-image-handlerstars1 - Takes an input image and processes it in many different ways using the Pillow library.
• ARHeadsetKitstars73 - High-level framework for using $5 Google Cardboard to replicate Microsoft Hololens.
• Interaction Treesstars159 - Library for representing recursive and impure programs.
• Sailstars388 - Tool for specifying instruction set architecture semantics of processors and generating Coq definitions.
• Monaestars62 - Monadic effects and equational reasoning.

• inuitcss - Extensible, scalable, Sass-based, OOCSS framework for large and long-lasting UI projects.
    Repostars1.8k | #SCSS

• Pico.css - Elegant styles for all native HTML elements, dark mode automatically enabled.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars5.8k | #SCSS

• turretcss - Responsive front-end framework for accessible and semantic websites.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars791 | #CSS

• PatternFly - UI framework for enterprise web applications.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars519 | #SCSS #LESS

• Tufte CSS - Style your webpage like Edward Tufte’s handouts.
    Repostars5.3k | #CSS

• Vanilla Framework - Simple, extensible CSS framework. Written by the Canonical Web Team.
    Demo, Docs, Repostars628 | #SCSS

• Open Discussion: Hosting of accepted papers, with their reviews, comments. Continued discussion forum associated with the paper post acceptance. Publication venue chairs/editors can control structure of review/comment forms, read/write access, and its timing.
• Open Directory: Collection of people, with conflict-of-interest information, including institutions and relations, such as co-authors, co-PIs, co-workers, advisors/advisees, and family connections.

• Open Recommendations: Models of scientific topics and expertise. Directory of people includes scientific expertise. Reviewer-paper matching for conferences with thousands of submissions, incorporating expertise, bidding, constraints, and reviewer balancing of various sorts. Paper recommendation to users.
• Open API: We provide a simple REST API [...]

• Open Source: We are committed to open source. Many parts of OpenReview are already in the OpenReview organization on GitHub. Some further releases are pending a professional security review of the codebase.

Reviewer-paper matching for conferences with thousands of submissions, incorporating expertise, bidding, constraints, and reviewer balancing of various sorts. Paper recommendation to users.
• Open API: We provide a simple REST API [...]

• Open Source: We are committed to open source. Many parts of OpenReview are already in the OpenReview organization on GitHub. Some further releases are pending a professional security review of the codebase.

• PyCaretstars6.4k - An open-source, low-code machine learning library in Python that automates machine learning workflows.
• clj-mlstars135 - A machine learning library for Clojure built on top of Weka and friends.
• Touchstonestars133 - Clojure A/B testing library.
• Flarestars282 - Dynamic Tensor Graph library in Clojure (think PyTorch, DynNet, etc.)
• tech.ml.datasetstars470 - Clojure dataframe library and pipeline for data processing and machine learning
• Pink Gorilla Notebookstars100 - A Clojure/Clojurescript notebook application/-library based on Gorilla-REPL
• notespacestars139 - Notebook experience in your Clojure namespace
• Delightstars271 - A listener that streams your spark events logs to delight, a free and improved spark UI
• kixistatsstars327 - A library of statistical distribution sampling and transducing functions
• neural-fortranstars236 - A parallel neural net microframework.

• detectron2stars22.5k - FAIR's next-generation research platform for object detection and segmentation. It is a ground-up rewrite of the previous version, Detectron, and is powered by the PyTorch deep learning framework.
• Shapleystars181 -> A data-driven framework to quantify the value of classifiers in a machine learning ensemble.
• brezestars96 - Theano based library for deep and recurrent neural networks.
• Opytimizerstars533 - Python-based meta-heuristic optimization techniques.
• TResNet: High Performance GPU-Dedicated Architecturestars420 - TResNet models were designed and optimized to give the best speed-accuracy tradeoff out there on GPUs.
• Jina AI An easier way to build neural search in the cloud. Compatible with Jupyter Notebooks.
• Flyte - Flyte makes it easy to create concurrent, scalable, and maintainable workflows for machine learning and data processing.
• Inkscape Electric Symbolsstars89 - Circuit Drawing Symbols for Inkscape
• Rust Jobs
• Dynamite Jobs - Jobs from remote-first companies
• remote | OK
• ML-Quant - Quant resources from ArXiv (sanity), SSRN, RePec, Journals, Podcasts, Videos, and Blogs.
• MASA.Blazorstars425 - A set of enterprise-class UI components based on Material Design and Blazor WebAssembly.
• Arcade - Arcade is a modern Python framework for crafting games with compelling graphics and sound.
• NixOS/nixops 🔥🔥🔥🔥stars1.2k - Use NixOS to provision EC2 instances, S3 buckets, and other resources.
• ReduxUIstars36 - Redux framework for easy use with SwiftUI.
• ngrok - Generate public URLs for internal servers (behind NAT/firewall).
• MAX116xx-10bit - SPI - Driver for the MAX11619-MAX11621, MAX11624 and MAX11625 10-bit ADCs - Intro blog post -
• QuadriFlow - Scalable and robust quadrangulation from triangulation. (C++, BSD, GitHubstars497)
• Evolutionary Deep Learning - by Micheal Lanham
• What is Neural Structured Learning by Andrew Ferlitsch
• Deep Learning Design Patterns by Andrew Ferlitsch
• Architecture of a Modern CNN: the design pattern approach by Andrew Ferlitsch
• Metaparameters in a CNN by Andrew Ferlitsch
• Multi-task CNN: a real-world example by Andrew Ferlitsch
• A friendly introduction to deep reinforcement learning by Luis Serrano
• What are GANs and how do they work? by Edward Raff
• Coding a basic WGAN in PyTorch by Edward Raff
• Training a Reinforcement Learning Agent by Miguel Morales
• G2 - an interactive and responsive charting library based on the grammar of graphics, maintained by Alibaba
• G6stars9.2k - Graph visualization library powered by Javascript & Typescript, maintained by Alibaba
• BizChartsstars6k - Data visualization library based on G2stars11.4k and React
• F2stars7.8k - An elegant, interactive and flexible charting library for mobile, maintained by Alibaba
• Graphologystars752 - A robust & multipurpose Graph object for javascript & TypeScript; Serves as a base library to power other graph visualization libraries.
• X6 - diagram creation library for rapid construction of DAG diagrams, ER diagrams, flowcharts and other applications, maintained by Alibaba
• The Grammar of Graphics by Leland Wilkinson. Basic visualization theory.
• Andrei Kashcha
• Jan Žák
• port-expander - I2C - Driver for I2C port expanders (supports PCA95xx, PCF85xx) - Intro blog post -
• driftctlstars2k - Detect, track and alert on infrastructure drift

• Spectre.css - Lightweight, responsive and modern CSS framework.
    Docs, Repostars11.1k | #SCSS
• CSS Algorithms: Lara Schenck, Strange Loop Conference 36:18
• Kubernetes explained
• TriWild - Robust triangulation with curve constraints. (C++, MPL 2, GitHubstars164)
• fTetWild - Same as TetWild, but faster. (C++, MPL 2, GitHubstars219)
• yt - Toolkit for analysis and visualization of volumetric data. (Python, BSD, GitHubstars356)
• Project Meshnet aims to build a sustainable decentralized alternative internet. Used by Hyperboria and built on CJDNS.

• cjdnsstars4.9k - Encrypted networking for regular people. cjdns implements an encrypted IPv6 network using public key cryptography for address allocation and a distributed hash table for routing. This provides near zero-configuration networking without many of the security and robustness issues that regular IPv4 and IPv6 networks have.

• OrbitDBstars7.3k is a serverless, distributed, peer-to-peer database. OrbitDB uses IPFS as its data storage and IPFS Pubsub to automatically sync databases with peers. It's an eventually consistent database that uses CRDTs for conflict-free database merges making OrbitDB an excellent choice for decentralized apps (dApps), blockchain applications and offline-first web applications.

• RenderJS is a JavaScript library which provides an easy way to define gadgets (aka mashups) in pure HTML5, without requiring any application server. It is suitable for the development of mobile applications, desktop applications.
• Telehash a new encrypted P2P JSON-based protocol enabling developers to quickly build apps that are distributed and private (see the protocol spec)

• Runway - Easier mobile releases for teams. Integrates across tools (version control, project management, CI, app stores, crash reporting, etc.) to provide a single source of truth for mobile teams to come together around during release cycles. Equal parts automation and collaboration.
• SciPy - Python modules for statistics, optimization, integration, linear algebra, etc. (Python, mostly BSD, GitHubstars10.3k)
• meshiostars1.3k - I/O for various mesh formats, file conversion. (Python, MIT, GitHub)
• MOAB - Representing and evaluating mesh data. (C++, mostly LGPL 3, Bitbucket)
• optimeshstars452 - Triangular mesh smoothing. (Python, GPL 3, GitHub)
• pmp-library - Polygon mesh processing library. (C++, MIT with Employer Disclaimer, GitHubstars853)
• Mmg - Robust, open-source & multidisciplinary software for remeshing. (C, LGPL 3, GitHubstars256)
• meshplexstars96 - Fast tools for simplex meshes. (Python, GPL 3, GitHub)
• XDMF - eXtensible Data Model and Format for data from High Performance Computing codes. (C++, GitLab)
• F3D - Cross-platform, fast, and minimalist 3D viewer with scientific visualization tools. (C++, BSD, GitHubstars699)
• vue-datepicker-nextstars56 - Vue 3.x component for datepicker / timepicker / datetimepicker / calendar
• Interactive Dashboards and Data Apps with Plotly and Dash: Harness the power of a fully fledged frontend web framework in Python – no JavaScript required.
• LibreWeb is a decentralized and open-source web browser leveraging the IPFS network, using markdown as document source code.
• Deno Weekly. A weekly roundup of news, tutorials and projects from the land of Deno, the newest JavaScript runtime on the block.
• fwstars393 — workspace productivity booster
• Labnotes. A weekly email about software development, tech, and anything else interesting.
• Data Privacy - A book that teaches you to implement technical privacy solutions and tools at scale. (early access, published continuously, final release January 2022)
• SLICK: Adopting SLOs for improved reliability
• fxtsstars524 - Lazy evaluation and concurrency.
• Databendstars4.7k - A Modern Real-Time Data Processing & Analytics DBMS with Cloud-Native Architecture
• image-rs/imageprocstars490 — An image processing library, based on the image library.

• Deep-Dive Terraform on Azure
• HashiCorp Infrastructure Automation Certification Guide

• ros2-docker - Connecting ROS 2 nodes running in Docker containers over the internet.
• Husarnet - Open Source, P2P, low-latency VPN dedicated for robots.

• terraform-credentials-vaultstars4 - A Terraform "credentials helper" plugin that allows providing credentials for Terraform-native services (private module registries, Terraform Cloud, etc) via environment variables.
• tfvaultenvstars45 - tfvaultenv reads secrets from HashiCorp Vault and outputs environment variables for various Terraform providers with those secrets.
• terrastatestars72 - Visual Studio Code extension to monitor/deploy/destroy Terraform resources in your workspace

• Four Steps to Creating Effective Game Day Tests
• Resiliency Planning for High-Traffic Events
• FastWARCstars20 - A high-performance WARC parsing library (Python).
• Backlight - Collaborative platform to build Design Systems on the code side. Empower your front-end with an all-in-one solution to manage components. Quick start, speed-up collaboration.
• OSDN - OSDN.net is a free-of-charge service for open source software developers, offering SVN/Git/Mercurial/Bazaar/CVS repositories and more.
• node-gcodestars29 - Node.js G-code interpreter and simulator.
• svg2gcodestars49 - Node.js command line utility for converting SVG to G-code.
• svg2gcodestars82 - Python utility for fast SVG to G-code conversion.
• jscut - A web-based utility for converting SVG to G-code.
• gcodeplotstars123 - Python utility to convert SVG and HPGL to G-code for a 3-axis CNC machine.
• vue-use-paginatorstars11 - Vue 3 use-hook to reactively paginate data and arrange paginator buttons. Completely renderless.

• AnyChart [FREE] - A flexible JavaScript library for creating interactive charts, maps, and dashboards for visual analytics. Provides students with a free license for use in their education or other non-commercial projects.
• localize-vue-3xstars1 - Uni Localization Vue 3 integration example. Customizable Language Menu widget built with Web Components.
• CraftQLstars83 - A CLI tool to visualize GraphQL schemas and to output a graph data structure as a graphviz .dot format.
• Inhumanity of Root Cause Analysis
• Electron TypeScript Preact Boilerplatestars3 - Electron starter project with TypeScript and Preact support, powered by esbuild.
• GraphicsJS - Lightweight JS graphics library with intuitive API, based on SVG/VML.
• What made SLOs so messy (and what we can do about it)
